title: Magnificently Dense Croatian Carnaroli Rice Risotto
description: A garlicky, dense, and indulgent Croatian dish featuring Carnaroli rice, lardons render, and whole30 friendly ingredients, this risotto is a hearty meal option. It is made with high quality ingredients and careful preparation to bring out the best flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the lardons and cook until crispy, then remove from the saucepan and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Carnaroli rice to the saucepan and cook for 2 minutes, until the rice is coated in oil and slightly toasted.
Add the white wine to the saucepan, if using, and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed.
Add 1 cup of warmed chicken broth to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed.
Repeat the process of adding the chicken broth in 1 cup increments, stirring constantly, until the rice is cooked and creamy.
Stir in the cooked lardons, salt, and black pepper.
Serve the risotto hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
